scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -s first "vite build --watch --emptyOutDir" "wait-on -v file:dist/index.html && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= ELECTRON_DIST_WATCH=1 electron ."
scripts.electron:dev:server: concurrently -k -s first "vite --strictPort" "wait-on -v http-get://localhost:5173/index.html http-get://localhost:5173/src/main.jsx && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 OPEN_DEVTOOLS=1 electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis,zip --publish never
scripts.pack: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis,zip --publish never
scripts.pack:dir: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "v%s" && npm run push-release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "v%s" && npm run push-release
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "v%s" && npm run push-release
scripts.publish: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis,zip --publish always
